title: stromanthe schottiana
intro: Stromanthe schottiana, also known as the 'Tricolor' or 'Purple Waffle Plant', is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and is known for its unique, waxy leaves with vibrant purple, green, and white colors. Traditionally, the leaves of Stromanthe schottiana are used in herbal medicine, where they are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is also valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, and is sometimes prepared as a tea or infused oil for its medicinal properties.
